title: Revert to Version 27

requirements.text: Revert the project to Version 27, undoing all changes introduced in Version 28. This includes reverting any modifications made to UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx as part of the Version 28 UPI deep link fix.
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend and backend files reflect the state of Version 27
Changes introduced in Version 28 (UPI deep link updates in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx) are no longer present
The application builds and runs successfully at the Version 27 state

constraints: Do not introduce any new changes beyond reverting to Version 27
nonGoals: Applying any new fixes or enhancements
